heading: Transferred
label: 3161 to 3161g Transferred
notes: CodificationPart G of title IV of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965, comprising this part, was renumbered part F of title IV of the General Education Provisions Act, by , , , transferred to subchapter VI (§ 1235 et seq.) of chapter 31 of this title, and subsequently repealed by , , .Pub.
